---
title: "IFCD044 Product Backlog"
categories: [ifcd044, backlog]
---


![Backlog course](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}



::: {.column-page-right}

## July 2023

| Sprint | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| #1 | 01 | 01/07/2026 |  - Cifo, Course, Teacher Introduction (2023 edition, why 100h course?) </br>  - Reference Books </br> - What is SCRUM and what is not </BR>  - SCRUM and mind (cognitive and learning): </br> (1) Intention</br> (2) Attention </br> (3) Hemispheres </br> (4) **Metacognition** </br> - Signal/Noise </br> </br> - 3 pilars SCRUM: </br> (1) Transparency </br> (2) Inspection </br> (3) Adaptation </br></br> - Class work: student's introduction and project's ideas | - [2023 edition](/ifcd044/ifcd044backlog-product.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  ![](/images/ifcd044-26/agile-2023.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  </br> </br>  - [The Intelligence Trap](/books/theIntellingenceTrap.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Mindset](/books/mindset.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [The Righteous Mind](/books/theRighteousMind.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [The status game](/books/statusGame.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  </br>  - [Stolen Focus](/books/StolenFocus.png){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Getting Things Done](/books/gettingthingsdone.qmd){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [SCRUM](/books/scrum.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [Mind Management Not Time Management](/books/MindManagementNotTimeManagement.jpg){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br> - [Scrum concepts](/scrum/scrum-what-concepts.qmd){.external target='_blank'}|
|  | 02 | 02/07/2026 | - SCRUM: Manifesto </br> - What is a boycott and why? Meetings are hell! </br> - SCRUM: iteration cycle at mind, at teamwork, at AI  </br></br> - **Lateralization**: hemispheres (McGilchrist) </br></br> - Week#01: meetings, impediments and iterations </br> </br> - SCRUM cycle: plan, execute, review and retrospect </br> - SCRUM roles: Scrum Master, Product Owner, Team, Specialist</br> - Artifacts: product backlog  | - [CIA Sabotage](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xXsLu2TXqbkuL_QIFKAOkofi8eVS12Lk/view?usp=sharing){.external target='_blank'}  </BR> - [Attention is All We Have](https://davidbessis.substack.com/p/attention-is-all-we-have){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Attention is all you need](https://arxiv.org/pdf/1706.03762){.external target='_blank'}  </br> </br> - [Week#01](/scrum/scrum-week1.qmd){.external target='_blank'} |
|  | 03 | 03/07/2026 | - Lateralization, Attention, Salience, Metacognition and Intention </br></br> - SCRUM Guide </br> - SCRUM definition </br>  </br> - Week#01: meetings, impediments and iterations </br> </br> - Approaches Multi-Agent App I: 2 teams and defining task areas  |  - [Week#01](/scrum/scrum-week1.qmd){.external target='_blank'}   </br></br> - [SCRUM Guide](/scrum/scrum-what-guide.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Manifesto](https://agilemanifesto.org/){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Metacognition](/scrum/scrum-articles-metacognition.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  |
|  |
| #2 | 04 |  06/07/2026 | - Planning Sprint#2: </br> (1) Plan Approaches Multi-Agent </br> (2) Plan readings </br> (3) Plan syllabus   </br></br>  - Week 1: Meetings, Impediments and Iterations  </br></br> - **SCRUM Guide**  </br> - Approaches Multi-Agent App: **AWS Architecture** |  ![](/images/ifcd044-26/sprint-1.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}</br> - [Week#01](/scrum/scrum-week1.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [SCRUM Guide](/scrum/scrum-what-guide.qmd){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Scrum Summary](https://albertprofe.dev/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/SCRUM-summary.html){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [AWS](https://aws.amazon.com/){.external target='_blank'} / [bedrock](https://aws.amazon.com/es/bedrock/){.external target='_blank'}</br> ![](/images/ifcd044-26/ApproachesMulti-AgentApp-architecture.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> - [Multi-Agent App AWS Architecture](/images/ifcd044-26/Multi-AgentApp.pdf){.external target='_blank'}|
|  | 05 | 07/07/2026 |  - **Week 2: User stories, Tasks and Habits** </br></br> - SCRUM: </br> (1) Guide: **values** </br> (2) Manifesto: 12 principles </br> (3) **Meetings**: does we need it? really? roles? time? goal/type? boycotts? nextTo?  </br></br> - CifoLab 13:00  | - [Week#02](/scrum/scrum-week2.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [SCRUM Guide](/scrum/scrum-what-guide.qmd){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Agile Project Success and Failure (The Story of the FBI Sentinel Program)](https://www.sei.cmu.edu/documents/4082/2017_017_001_495733.pdf){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [SCRUM: summary](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/SCRUM-summary.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](/images/ifcd044-26/scrum-cloud-keywords.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br>  |
|  | 06 | 08/07/2026 |  - Week 2: User stories, Tasks and Habits </br> <s>- Week 3: Delivering Value & Communication</s>  </br></br> - SCRUM </br> (1) Manifesto: 12 principles </br> (2) Meetings: does we need it? really? roles? time? goal/type? metrics? boycotts? nextTo? </br> (3) **Meetings**: counter-measures </br> (4) decision-making: type? **irrelevant decision-making discussion**  </br> (5) decision-making: irreversible or not? high-complexity or not? |  - [Week#03](/scrum/scrum-week3.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [SCRUM Manifesto: 12 principles](/scrum/scrum-what-agile-manifesto.qmd){.external target='_blank'}</br>   |
|  | 07 | 09/07/2026 | - Week 2: User stories, Tasks and Habits </br> - <s>Week 3: Delivering Value & Communication  </br> - Week 4: ScrumMaster, how it works  </s></br></br>  - SCRUM: </br> (1) Manifesto: 12 principles  </br> (2) common vocabulary: scrum vocabulary, linkein, etc.. </br> (3) definition of done: why, done-template, counter-mesures, metrics   </br> (4) planning poker fibonacci: decision-making    </br></br>     |  - [Week#04](/scrum/scrum-week4.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [SCRUM Manifesto: 12 principles](/scrum/scrum-what-agile-manifesto.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [complex system](https://www.complexsystemsframeworks.ca/complex-vs-complicated/){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](/images/ifcd044-26/Stacey-Matrix-scaled.jpg){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  </br> - [linkedin job](https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/4435553660/){.external target='_blank'} |
|  | 08 | 10/07/2026 | - Week 2: User stories, Tasks and Habits </br> - <s> Week 3: Delivering Value & Communication  </br> - Week 4: ScrumMaster, how it works </br> - Week 5: Mindset, the key to everything </s> </br></br>   - SCRUM: </br>  (1) Review Sprint#1: Approaches Multi-Agent App </BR>  (2) TasK AND done: INVEST  </br> (3) Jira backlog  </br></br> - Cognitive loads  | - [Week#05](/scrum/scrum-week5.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  </br>  - [Week#02](/scrum/scrum-week2.qmd){.external target='_blank'}   |
|  |
| #3 | 09 |  13/07/2026 |  |  |
|  | 10 | 14/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 11 | 15/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 12 | 16/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 13 | 17/07/2026 |   |     |
|  |
| #4 | 14 |  20/07/2026 |  |  |
|  | 15 | 21/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 16 | 22/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 17 | 23/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 18 | 24/07/2026 |   |     |
: Backlog course July 2026 table {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,60,34]"}




:::
